DESCRIPTION: Identifier for the tumor sample being analyzed
Type of structural variant: DEL (deletion), DUP (duplication), INV (inversion), BND (translocation/breakend)
Predicted protein fusion status: "Protein Fusion: in frame {GENE1:GENE2}", "out of frame", or blank
HUGO gene symbol for the gene at the first breakpoint
HUGO gene symbol for the gene at the second breakpoint
Precise location of the first breakpoint within or near gene1 (e.g., "Intron of GENE(+):2Kb before exon 3")
Precise location of the second breakpoint within or near gene2
Chromosome of the first breakpoint
Start coordinate (bp) of the first breakpoint
End coordinate (bp) of the first breakpoint
Chromosome of the second breakpoint
Start coordinate (bp) of the second breakpoint
End coordinate (bp) of the second breakpoint
Strand orientation of the adjacency in BEDPE format (DEL: +-, DUP: -+, INV: ++/--, BND: varies)
Repetitive DNA element (e.g., Alu, LINE, SVA) at the first breakpoint, or blank
Repetitive DNA element at the second breakpoint, or blank
max(SCORE_SPAN, SCORE_SPLIT) - overall read-support score across all callers
maximum of paired-end/discordant ALT read counts across callers (manta_PR ALT, delly_DV, svaba_DR)
maximum of split/junction ALT read counts across callers (manta_SR ALT, delly_RV, svaba_SR)
Comma-separated list of callers that detected this variant (brass, delly, manta, svaba)
Number of callers that detected this variant
Number of callers where the variant passed quality filters (more stringent than NumCallers)
Cytogenetic band annotation from the COSMIC Cancer Gene Census
Tumor variant allele fraction from DELLY spanning/paired-end reads: t_delly_DV / (t_delly_DV + t_delly_DR)
Tumor variant allele fraction from DELLY junction/split reads: t_delly_RV / (t_delly_RV + t_delly_RR)
Normal variant allele fraction from DELLY spanning reads (expect ~0 for somatic variants)
Normal variant allele fraction from DELLY junction reads (expect ~0 for somatic variants)
Tumor variant allele fraction from SVABA: t_svaba_AD / t_svaba_DP
Normal variant allele fraction from SVABA (expect ~0 for somatic variants)
Tumor variant allele fraction from MANTA junction/split reads
Paired-end support of the structural variant (DELLY)
Split-read support of the structural variant (DELLY)
Tumor spanning paired-read counts for ref and alt alleles from MANTA, format "REF,ALT"
Tumor split-read counts for ref and alt alleles from MANTA, format "REF,ALT"
Allele depth: number of tumor reads supporting the variant allele (SVABA)
Number of tumor spanning reads supporting the variant (SVABA)
Normal spanning paired-read counts for ref and alt alleles from MANTA, format "REF,ALT"
Normal split-read counts for ref and alt alleles from MANTA, format "REF,ALT"
Allele depth: number of normal reads supporting the variant allele (SVABA; expect 0 for somatic)
Number of normal spanning reads supporting the variant (SVABA; expect 0 for somatic)
Number of high-quality tumor read-pairs supporting the reference allele (DELLY)
Number of high-quality tumor read-pairs supporting the variant allele (DELLY)
Number of high-quality tumor junction reads supporting the reference allele (DELLY)
Number of high-quality tumor junction reads supporting the variant allele (DELLY)
Number of tumor discordant read-pairs supporting the variant (SVABA)
Number of high-quality normal read-pairs supporting the reference allele (DELLY)
Number of high-quality normal read-pairs supporting the variant allele (DELLY; expect 0 for somatic)
Number of high-quality normal junction reads supporting the reference allele (DELLY)
Number of high-quality normal junction reads supporting the variant allele (DELLY; expect 0 for somatic)
Number of normal discordant read-pairs supporting the variant (SVABA; expect 0 for somatic)
Cancer types where this gene has known somatic mutations (COSMIC Cancer Gene Census)
Hereditary cancer syndromes associated with germline mutations in this gene (Cancer Gene Census)
Cancer Gene Census classification of the gene's mutation role (e.g., oncogene, TSG, fusion)
Known translocation partner genes from the Cancer Gene Census
Database of Genomic Variants entries (name and variant type) overlapping the first breakpoint
Database of Genomic Variants entries (name and variant type) overlapping the second breakpoint
Consensus breakpoint sequence from the DELLY CONSENSUS INFO field (DNA sequence, or NA)
Identifier for the matched normal sample
Unique identifier for this specific variant call
